title: Middle East crisis live: Iranian official claims strait of Hormuz open to all but ships of ‘enemy’ countries
summary_full: Iran has effectively closed strait by attacking ships and reportedly laying mines in the waterway, causing major crisis in global energy marketsSeveral blasts could be heard from Jerusalem on Sunday, AFP journalists said, after the Israeli military warned of incoming missile fire from Iran towards central Israel.Israel’s Magen David Adom emergency medical service said there were no immediate reports of casualties. Continue reading...
